name: Jiangsu Guomao Reducer Co., Ltd.
summary: Jiangsu Guomao Reducer Co.,Ltd. produces and sells reducers, gearbox, gearmotors, and motors. The company's products include AP-palm oil and geared motors; cycloidal, and plastic and rubber special reducers; and industrial, planetary, and PV series gearboxes. It serves steel, rubber and plastic, palm oil, and crane industries. The company was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Changzhou, China.
